arts.ttl: Lazio & Marco Baroni Reportedly Agree Contract Extension
arts.sum: Lazio manager Marco Baroni is reportedly set to sign a new contract that will push back the deadline to June 2027. The Background Club president Claudio Lotito and sporting director Angelo Fabiani identified the 61-year-old as the right profile to oversee the major revamp started last summer, especially following his sensational campaign at Hellas Verona […] The post Lazio & Marco Baroni Reportedly Agree Contract Extension appeared first on The Laziali.

arts.ttl: Lazio Veteran Set To Stay Despite Rejuvenation Plans – Swift Agreement Expected
arts.sum: Lazio are expected to extend their collaboration with Matias Vecino beyond the current campaign, even though they’re aiming to inject fresh blood into their ranks.
